title: Usefull Rotten Flesh
description: This mod makes rotten flesh absolutely useful!
body:
Usefull rotten flesh turns rotten flesh into a tactical survival tool.
Instead of being useless junk, rotten flesh can be instantly used from the player's left hand to trigger a custom smearing action:

![The full smearing experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39c3edb66896dbf32fb1223df03208f52315d84c.png)

One piece is consumed, a custom first-person and third-person smear animation plays, and the player gains the Stench effect for four minutes. While Stench is active, nearby hostile threats become easier to manage because creepers, normal skeletons, zombie villagers, angry wolves, hoglins, vexes, vindicators, and witches are pacified within range. Stench also creates a close-range pressure aura that reduces air supply by up to five bubbles for nearby players (including the stench user) while they stay close, recovering once they move away.

The mod includes custom visual identity with a dedicated Stench status-effect icon and a pixel-art mod icon, and is designed to feel lightweight, responsive, and multiplayer-friendly.
